reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion, excelente precio a los socios Aca. La habitacion impecable, los servicios impecables... Ideal para cuando se esta de transito.

Excellent service, excellent price for Aca members. The room was spotless, the amenities impeccable... Ideal for when you're in transit.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para ir por ruta 3 para el sur sin tener que pasar por Bahia Blanca, buen restaurant, buena atencion y precios.

(Translated by Google)
A must-see stop on Route 3 heading south without having to go through Bahia Blanca. Good restaurant, good service and good prices.

reviews.comment:
No lo cambio por nada cundo voy para el
Sur. Económico , buena comida e inmejorable lugar pegado a la ruta

(Translated by Google)
I wouldn't trade it for anything when I'm heading south.
It's affordable, has good food, and is in an unbeatable location right off the highway.

reviews.comment:
Bueno para pasar una noche. Habitaciones confortables. Muy caro el restaurante si no sos socio del ACA. La confitería bien. El desayuno muy pobre. Es para alojarse de paso y nada más.

(Translated by Google)
Good for an overnight stay. Comfortable rooms. The restaurant is very expensive if you're not an ACA member. The café is decent. The breakfast is very poor. It's only suitable for a short stay.

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar y buena atención. Y el socio tiene un descuento sobre el consumo. Quienes lo deseen posee hostelería para descansar. Las imágenes publicadas es una tarjeta que me dieron cuando pasé en enero 2018.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely place with good service. Members also get a discount on their purchases. Those who wish to relax can enjoy the on-site restaurant. The images posted are from a card they gave me when I visited in January 2018.
